verdict_reason_external: The engineering layer offers the three properties as a structural analog for the contract-vs-implementation distinction. The original verse — about the Self's three properties (avyakta, acintya, avikārya) and the therefore-clause closing the imperishable block — is preserved in literal_meaning and traditional_meaning_consensus. The disagreements_among_translators field carries the Shankara/Ramanuja stake. The engineering layer does not claim BG 2.25 is fundamentally about software deprecation; it offers the three-property structure plus the therefore-clause as a usable engineering discipline for handling deprecation announcements. The counter-example field even references Chapter 18.66 as the corrective for over-reading the no-grief instruction. PASS.
